bullets: Architect unified model-development platforms supporting large language model fine-tuning across shared compute infrastructure.
Build high-throughput GPU inference servers with strict latency requirements for mission-critical production workloads.
Develop agentic ML-platform tools utilizing internal knowledge bases to improve engineer productivity and deployment velocity.
Led deep learning solutions from 0-to-1, enabling scalable, code-free training and serving for production systems.
Streamlined feature release processes across regions to drastically reduce time-to-market.
Optimized model building and feature extraction pipelines, resulting in substantial annual cost savings.
Researched and developed an AI-assisted monitoring system, successfully deployed to partnered medical centers.
